_meta.name: gadmin-list-users
_meta.description: Navigate to Google Admin Users list and perceive the table of all users.
anomalies: perceive required — Google Admin is a React/Angular SPA; read returns null after navigate
No H1/H2 headings on users page — Google uses custom elements. perceive returns headings:[].
Table headers are doubled with sort instructions concatenated: 'NameName Name. Sorted in ascending order...'
Table shows 20 rows per page (pagination). rowCount reflects current page only.
Per-row action buttons ('Reset password', 'Rename user') appear as floating buttons — not in mainActions

chain.note: All Google Admin paths use /ac/ prefix. Hard-code full URLs.
Google Admin SPA needs ~3s to populate table from API.

Returns table with headers (doubled): ['', 'NameName...', 'EmailEmail...', 'Last sign in...', 'Email usage...', 'Google Photos usage...', '']. rowCount=20 (one page). Per-user actions in buttons: 'Reset password', 'Rename user'.

add-user-button.description: Primary button to open Add new user dialog
add-user-button.note: Confirmed visible via click_text('Add new user'). CSS selector unverified — use click_text as fallback.

user-search.description: Search box: 'Search for users, groups, settings, or devices'
user-search.cachedSelector: input[aria-label='Search for users, groups, settings, or devices']
